item.title: A message from Prom Committee:
item.description: Reminder all Grade 11 students interested in joining next year’s Prom Committee! Don’t miss our information meeting tomorrow at lunch in Room 202. Come find out how you can get involved in planning prom and help make it a night to remember!

item.title: A message from Mr. Curtis:
item.description: The Spring Music Concert is tomorrow evening @7:00pm, the concert will feature the Yardbirds and our dynamic STA Senior Band! No price at the door, but will be accepting food doantions for our local food bank. Staff and students are welcome to attend as we celebrate the work of these musicians this year.

item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: All students helping with the liturgy today should be in the atrium at this time.

item.title: A message from the Unity Club:
item.description: This morning is your last opportunity to sign up for "Elevate & Empower: Voices of Pride; Love in Colour." Scan the QR code on the posters to sign up, or see Mrs. Kwok for more information.

item.title: A message from Ms. Brennan:
item.description: Roll up your sleeves, Garden Club members! Let's get out in the beautiful weather after school Wednesday and Thursday to continue our spring cleanup. Details are on our Teams page. New members are always welcome!
